01_metadata.auto.tfvars:
# DERIVED FLAGS (For downstream templates)
# These are computed from the configuration above
# ============================================================================

# Profile-based configuration
_derived_profile = "simple"

# Compliance settings
_derived_has_compliance_requirements = true
_derived_compliance_frameworks = [
  "cis"
]

# Regional settings
_derived_is_multi_region = false
_derived_regions = [
  "europe-west1"
]

# Environment settings
_derived_is_production = false
_derived_environment_type = "multi_env"

# ============================================================================
# Next Steps:
# 1. Review the configuration above for accuracy
# 2. Proceed to 02_resource_hierarchy.tfvars for folder structure
# 3. This metadata will be referenced by all downstream configurations
# ============================================================================
02_resource_hierarchy.auto.tfvars:
_derived_hierarchy_summary = {
  hierarchy_type     = "environment_based"
  project_id_prefix  = "acme"
  naming_convention  = "{prefix}-{env}-{purpose}"

  folder_count       = 2
  folder_names       = [
    "Production",
    "Development"
  ]

  environment_count  = 2
  production_envs    = [
    "Production"
  ]

  bootstrap_projects = [
    "prj-shared-services"
  ]
}
06_security_baseline.auto.tfvars:
_derived_compliance_standard = "cis_gcp_v2"
_derived_cmek_enabled = true
_derived_data_access_logging_enabled = true
_derived_log_retention_days = 365
_derived_org_policy_count = 8
_derived_access_transparency_enabled = false
_derived_access_approval_enabled     = false
_derived_data_residency_enforced = false
_derived_assured_workloads_enabled = false
_derived_data_classification_enabled = true
_derived_classification_tiers = [
  "internal",
  "confidential"
]
_derived_cloud_armor_enabled = true
_derived_waf_policy_count    = 1
